items.title: Derivative Path Inc. - Machine Learning Intern
items.description: Researching and prototyping neural network models to improve traditional quantitative methods in derivatives pricing and risk measurement. Building deep learning models (feedforward, CNNs, RNNs/LSTMs, transformers) to replace Monte Carlo based methods. Designing experiments comparing neural models against benchmark analytical solutions and traditional numerical methods. Developing data pipelines for generating training data from pricing engines and preprocessing financial time series. Analyzing accuracy, stability, computational performance, and potential latency improvements for complex derivatives and portfolio risk metrics.

items.title: ATB Financial - Data Developer Student
items.description: Data developer internship with the Data & AI Platforms team focusing on data platform development and AI integration. Working on data pipeline architecture, platform optimization, and supporting data-driven decision making across the organization. Collaborating with cross-functional teams to implement scalable data solutions and enhance platform capabilities.

items.title: Sequova Consulting Inc. - Cofounder/Developer
items.description: Co-founded consulting firm helping companies reduce expenditures through ML/AI optimization solutions. Led development of MLP regression model trained on web-scraped news articles and live APIs to predict economic trends (Bullish/Bearish/Neutral). Architected larger MLP model for commodity price prediction and export location optimization. Led client acquisition, securing founding client.

items.title: Investment Management Corporation of Ontario (IMCO) - Software Engineering Intern
items.description: Led team developing Python tools to improve daily operations for Performance Measurement and Analysis. Automated data transfer between performance systems. Conducted Python training for team members to maintain codebase.

items.title: Steam Works Studio - Lead Instructor
items.description: Taught 8 unique courses covering coding, robotics, and 3D printing for children aged 5-15 (35 hours/week during summer). Handled customer interactions at advertising events and advised on marketing strategies. Oversaw hiring and created curriculum for 4 new courses with documented teaching procedures.

items.title: Localy Mississauga - Founder
items.description: Developed a mobile application with Python, Kivy, and SQLite for iOS and Android to support local businesses during COVID-19, in collaboration with the Economic Development Council of Ontario. Created custom Linux and macOS distributions for App Store deployment. Built and maintained a database with a user interface for business data interaction.

items.title: DrawBot - Autonomous Whiteboard Drawing Robot
items.description: Engineered a wall-climbing robot that autonomously reproduces digital images on magnetic whiteboards. Led development of navigation and control systems including motor PID loops, encoder integration, and odometry sensor fusion. Implemented servo and marker control logic, integrated webcam-based computer vision for absolute positioning, and developed a web-based debugging interface for manual control and telemetry. Collaborated on software integration using FreeRTOS task scheduling, coordinating real-time G-code execution, navigation state machines, and multi-subsystem synchronization across drive systems, drawing mechanisms, and localization sensors.

items.title: Image Filtering with Gaussian & Laplacian Pyramids
items.description: Applied Gaussian and Laplacian pyramids for image processing tasks including multi-resolution blending, detail enhancement, and noise reduction. Leveraged pyramid techniques to decompose, filter, and combine images.

items.title: ICU Patient Survival Prediction Model
items.description: Developed ML model predicting 30-day ICU patient mortality using Python and scikit-learn. Implemented feature extraction, missing data imputation, and normalization. Conducted hyperparameter tuning with cross-validation for logistic regression. Addressed class imbalance with asymmetric cost functions and explored non-linear modeling using kernel methods.

items.title: Linear Classifier / Perceptron Algorithm Visualizer
items.description: A Python-based Matplotlib visualizer demonstrating the Perceptron Algorithm to find linear classifiers for linearly separable datasets.

items.title: LC2K ISA & Processor
items.description: Developed assembler, simulator, and linker in C to support LC2K ISA, allowing users to write and simulate Assembly code. Simulations run on custom 5-stage pipelined processor with caching.

items.title: Neurosurf
items.description: Utilized commercial EEG headband (Muse) to extract user emotional state. Captured live sensor data from 4 sensors, processing via Fourier transform to determine frequency band strength. Trained ML models detecting blinks with 98% accuracy and classical music listening with 85% accuracy. Created graphical GUI displaying data and model predictions.

items.title: Options Trading Live Data Collector
items.description: Wrapper for Interactive Brokers TCP Socket Protocol API collecting live options trading data and storing in Excel workbooks. Data filtered through trading criteria to generate purchase recommendations.

items.title: MBus API Tracker
items.description: Program using Python and Requests module to collect University of Michigan MBus system data. Tracks bus locations in real-time, plotting them on live map to help understand the bus system and navigate campus.

items.title: N-Body Gravity Simulation
items.description: 2D physics engine using Newtonian physics laws and Euler integration to simulate gravitational motion. Includes functionality to visualize gravitational field lines and object trajectories.

items.title: OpenCV Face Detection
items.description: A Python software suite using OpenCV to detect faces from video files or live camera streams. It uses a Haar Cascade Classifier to detect faces and draw bounding boxes. The suite also includes programs to collect facial data for Haar Cascade Classifier training.

items.title: Elevator GUI Simulation
items.description: Elevator simulation using GUI to show movement in a 10-floor building. Includes realistic elevator animations and button functionality on each floor and inside the elevator.

items.title: Calculus II Answer Key Web Scraper
items.description: A program using Python and BeautifulSoup to scrape University of Michigan Calculus II websites for answer keys. It creates an HTML webpage enabling quick searching of problems with links to official solutions.

items.title: Google Maps API Scraper
items.description: A Python program using the Google Maps API to scrape a database of every city and town in Ontario, Canada. It uses restricted API calls to extract location names, attractions, and population data, storing them in an SQLite database. It enables searching for locations and displaying information in a user-friendly manner.

items.title: Voronoi Diagram Generator
items.description: Python program using list of points to create colored Voronoi diagrams.
